title: Mayor Owens Announces Annual Tour for Safe and Healthy Housing
summary: Mayor Owens announces Healthy Housing 101, an annual educational tour hosted by the Division of Code Enforcement on June 16, 2026, at 324 Academy Place. The event features tours of a vacant home to educate residents on common code violations (lead, exterior/interior issues) and provides access to city resources and community agency support for safe and healthy housing maintenance.
department_refs: Office of Neighborhood and Business Development

political_signal.description: Mayor's office elevates housing safety and code enforcement as civic priority through public education and multi-agency coordination; signals commitment to constituent support and transparent city operations.
